description:
Goal:
Create the adapter lifecycle without touching real broker sites.

Scope:
- BrokerAdapter interface
- mock adapter
- job result types
- statuses: queued, running, submitted, awaiting_confirmation, verified_removed, failed, manual_required

Acceptance:
- Mock adapter executes through the lifecycle.
- Results are persisted.
- manual_required is a first-class result.
- No Playwright dependency required yet unless structurally useful.
title: Define adapter interface and mock execution engine
